overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player exits a shaded overpass into a sunlit intersection, crosses the street, and continues along a commercial sidewalk lined with neon signs and billboards, ending near a police encounter in a narrow alley.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded overpass leading to sunlit intersection

events.description: exits covered walkway into bright open intersection with crosswalk
dark sedan and other vehicles drive through the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: walking from shaded sidewalk into sunlit intersection, approaching and entering crosswalk

notable_agents.action: dark maroon sedan driving through the intersection from left to right
person with backpack walking ahead of ego toward the crosswalk

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard with red and blue branding and palm tree graphics
elevated highway or maglev track structure spanning across the intersection
distinctive cylindrical mega-structure with external scaffolding visible in the distance
dark brown brick building with multiple windows and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a shaded overpass and transitions into a bright sunlit urban intersection. The player approaches a crosswalk while vehicles pass through the intersection. A large Cirrus Cola billboard dominates the view ahead, with a distinctive tall skyscraper visible in the distance.

events.description: turns left onto sidewalk after crossing the intersection
pink sports car drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various storefronts with neon signage, observing street activity

notable_agents.action: pink sports car driving along the street from left to right
pedestrian with distinctive spiked hair walking in same direction ahead of ego

entered.detail: various illuminated business signs including cyberware and liquor store neon
tall modern street light pole with horizontal arm

segments.scene_description: After crossing the intersection, the player turns left and walks along a sunlit commercial sidewalk. Neon storefront signs line the left side while a pink sports car drives past on the right. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions along the busy city street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with large advertising displays

events.description: passing large horizontal billboard advertising beverages

agents.ego_description: continuing steadily along the sidewalk past pedestrians and observing large billboards

notable_agents.action: man in yellow plaid shirt standing on the sidewalk edge

entered.detail: large horizontal billboard with beverage advertisement and neon green text
rainbow-colored decorative banners strung across the street between buildings
storefront with illuminated 'Electronics' signage in blue neon

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a commercial street dominated by large advertising displays. A prominent 'BOTTOMS UP' billboard stands on the right while colorful banners stretch across the street ahead. Various neon storefronts line the left side of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley with police presence

events.description: entering narrower street section with police activity and parked patrol car
approaching police officers standing guard next to patrol vehicle

agents.ego_description: walking toward a police car parked on the sidewalk with armed officers standing nearby

notable_agents.action: police officer in tactical armor standing by the patrol car door
teal and white police sedan parked on the sidewalk with emergency lights

entered.detail: blue and yellow automated vendor booth with illuminated displays
large vertical billboard with colorful cereal advertisement featuring cartoon character

segments.scene_description: The street narrows as the player approaches a police presence. A teal police car is parked on the sidewalk with officers in tactical gear standing nearby. Colorful banners continue to stretch across the street ahead, and a large vertical advertisement for 'Splash Macs' covers the building wall on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the cool shadows of an overpass into the vibrant, neon-saturated bustle of a commercial city district. It begins by emerging from the shade into a bright sunlit intersection, moving toward a crosswalk beneath a towering Cirrus Cola billboard and a distant skyscraper. As the camera crosses the street and turns left, the environment shifts into a sun-drenched sidewalk lined with neon storefronts and passing pedestrians, punctuated by a pink sports car speeding by. The scene then expands along a commercial corridor dominated by large advertising displays and colorful overhead banners, including a prominent Bottoms Up billboard. Finally, the wide street narrows as the camera approaches a teal police car and officers in tactical gear, passing a large vertical Splash Macs advertisement on the left.
